metadata.description: Poppify creative-video tooling for Claude Code — generate cinematic vertical reels from photos or topics.

plugins.name: poppify
plugins.description: Photo-led short-form vertical reels for Instagram / TikTok / YouTube Shorts / Facebook Reels. Upload 1–10 photos, get a captioned 15/30/60s reel with motion, music, and optional voiceover — $0.06 base render, 50 free seeds on signup, no subscription. Recipe-driven composition (14 narrative frameworks), 4-scope library search before any AI generation. Standalone primitives (generate_image, generate_music, generate_voiceover) callable on their own. Not for: text→video generation, 4K horizontal output, or sub-4s clips — use a generative video MCP for those.
